title: Publish to npm before git push

source.memory_recall_query: RELEASE.md publish order npm before push Passkey not OTP

advisory.one_line: Release order is npm publish (Passkey, never --otp) BEFORE git push; read docs/RELEASE.md first.

title: Supabase RLS five hygiene gates on every new DB object

source.incident: 2026-05-06 RLS sweep found PUBLIC INSERT + PUBLIC EXECUTE + mutable search_path
source.memory_recall_query: Supabase RLS holes case study 2026-05-06 five gates

advisory.one_line: New DB object? Verify 5 RLS gates: RLS enabled, no WITH CHECK (true)/PUBLIC, REVOKE EXECUTE FROM PUBLIC, search_path pinned, no anon write path.

title: Two-stage submit for TermDeck panel injects

source.incident: Single-stage paste+CR races; 4th panel left awaiting human Enter (broken sleep 2026-04-26/27)
source.memory_recall_query: overnight broken sleep inject submit single stage two-stage

advisory.one_line: Inject in two stages: POST the bracketed-paste body, settle ~400ms, then POST the submit (CR) alone — never ride the CR on the paste write. Prefer {submit:true}.

source.incident: Sprint 51.7 lane-shape mismatch broke cross-lane grep
source.memory_recall_query: lane shape mismatch case Sprint 51.7 uniform post header

advisory.one_line: STATUS posts must match: ### [T<n>] VERB YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM ET — gist, VERB in the allowed set. Uniform shape keeps cross-lane grep working.

source.incident: Auditor panel compacts mid-sprint and loses in-context audit state
source.memory_recall_query: auditor panel compacts mid-sprint CHECKPOINT discipline

advisory.one_line: Auditor: post a CHECKPOINT at every phase boundary and at least every 15 min — phase, verified (file:line), pending, latest FIX-LANDED ref.

title: Tolerant idle-poll regex for cross-lane waits

source.incident: Brittle prefix-required DONE poll missed prefixless posts
source.memory_recall_query: tolerant idle-poll regex hardening cross-lane monitoring

advisory.one_line: Cross-lane DONE polls must use a tolerant regex: ^(### )?\[T<n>\] DONE\b — never the brittle prefix-required form.

title: No DONE while a YELLOW is open

source.incident: Lane posted DONE with an unresolved YELLOW; close-out missed it
source.memory_recall_query: DONE with open YELLOW lane close-out seam

advisory.one_line: Don't post DONE while your lane has an open YELLOW or unresolved FINDING — resolve or hand off first; ORCH close-out trusts DONE.

title: No secrets in commits (gitleaks pre-commit + pre-push)

source.incident: gitleaks hooks installed 2026-05-06 to block secret + forbidden-string commits

advisory.one_line: Secrets and forbidden strings are blocked at commit/push by gitleaks hooks. Don't --no-verify; fix the source or allowlist a true false-positive.

source.incident: Sprint 64: PreCompact hook (Claude) + server periodic-capture timer (Codex/Gemini/Grok)
source.memory_recall_query: orthogonal harness-hook server-side substrate compaction-near capture

advisory.one_line: Compaction-near capture is mechanized: PreCompact hook for Claude panels, server periodic-capture timer for non-Claude panels. Manual remember is fallback.

check.pattern: non-fast-forward|Updates were rejected|failed to push some refs

source.incident: Push rejected; before force-push the repo mirror must be current
source.memory_recall_query: gitleaks mirror backup before destructive history rewrite force push

advisory.one_line: Push rejected (non-fast-forward). Pull/rebase or fetch first. Before ANY force-push, confirm the ~/git-backups mirror is current (git-mirror-active-repos.sh).

source.incident: PostgREST/psql 42501 traces to a missing RLS policy or EXECUTE grant
source.memory_recall_query: Supabase RLS holes five gates REVOKE EXECUTE FROM PUBLIC search_path

advisory.one_line: Postgres permission denied (42501). Check the table's RLS policy + function EXECUTE grants; service_role bypasses RLS, anon/authenticated need an explicit policy.

title: npm publish auth failure (use Passkey, not --otp)

check.pattern: npm (error|ERR!).*(E403|ENEEDAUTH|EOTP|403 Forbidden|one-time)|this operation requires a one-time password

source.incident: @jhizzard/* publishes via web Passkey; --otp is the wrong path
source.memory_recall_query: RELEASE.md publish order npm before push Passkey not OTP

advisory.one_line: npm publish auth failure: @jhizzard/* authenticates via web Passkey — never pass --otp. Read docs/RELEASE.md (publish BEFORE push).

source.incident: Sprint substrate uses :3001 when :3000 is the daily-driver instance
source.memory_recall_query: TermDeck server port 3000 3001 substrate daily-driver instance

advisory.one_line: Port already in use (EADDRINUSE). The TermDeck sprint substrate runs on :3001 when :3000 is the daily-driver — target :3001 or free the port first.

check.pattern: gitleaks.*(leaks? found|finding)|secret detected|commit (blocked|rejected) by gitleaks|leaks found:

source.incident: gitleaks pre-commit/pre-push hooks block secrets + forbidden strings
source.memory_recall_query: gitleaks mirror backup install verification forbidden strings

advisory.one_line: Commit/push blocked by gitleaks — a real secret or a forbidden string. Don't --no-verify; fix the source, or allowlist a genuine false-positive in ~/.gitleaks.toml.
